packages.name: @kohaku-eth/provider
packages.loomSurface: Provider abstraction for verified and replaceable transports

packages.name: @kohaku-eth/privacy-pools
packages.loomSurface: Privacy-pools backend and private withdrawal research path

packages.name: @kohaku-eth/tornado-cash
packages.productionGate: Do not expose as default UX until dependency graph, jurisdictional risk, relayer assumptions, and withdrawal safety are reviewed.

packages.name: packages/pq-account
packages.loomSurface: Hybrid ECDSA plus post-quantum ERC-4337 account compatibility and migration research
packages.productionGate: Do not import into Loom core until independently audited, gas-reviewed, tested for two-signature verification semantics, and wrapped behind a delayed migration path.

packages.name: @a16z/helios
packages.loomSurface: Verified RPC and private state reads for wallet clients
packages.productionGate: Require per-chain support review, checkpoint-source policy, fallback behavior, and mobile/WASM integration tests.

packages.name: colibri-stateless
packages.loomSurface: Optional stateless RPC/provider path for Kohaku Railgun indexers
packages.productionGate: Require prover endpoint review, availability assumptions, and metadata-leakage analysis before enabling.
